sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17699" key="au)toennea/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-εννεάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the ideal number nine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:836:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">836.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
